title: Dry-run cleanup
outcome: archon-bin-cleanup implements four modes. report-only (default) and dry-run print plans with no action. archive/delete-approved validate args then refuse at draft gateway (never call rm/mv). delete-approved requires --scope; invalid/traversal scopes rejected; DUST_AGENT=1 refused. Blocked: no-manifest, permanent, lib/src, approved_to mismatch. moon archon:bin-cleanup wired.
validation: report-only and dry-run exit 0; archive/delete-approved exit 1 with deferred message; agent + bad-scope refusals exit 1; archon:validate PASS; no bin/lib/src mutations.
decisions: draft gateway: archive/delete validate then refuse — real mutation deferred to H12/Kraken
delete-approved requires both --scope under namespace bin/ and matching approved_to
token_note: exact cleanup plan in one read; enabling safety prerequisite
